'''chazuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanholder|loanholder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanholder|loanholder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzirith|chæzirith]] || [[word:chæzirij|chæzirij]] || [[word:chæzirish|chæzirish]] || [[word:chæziri|chæziri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazuzuruth|chazuzuruth]] || [[word:chazuzuruj|chazuzuruj]] || [[word:chazuzurush|chazuzurush]] || [[word:chazuzuru|chazuzuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazuruth|chazuruth]] || [[word:chazuruj|chazuruj]] || [[word:chazurush|chazurush]] || [[word:chazuru|chazuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazufruth|chazufruth]] || [[word:chazufruj|chazufruj]] || [[word:chazufrush|chazufrush]] || [[word:chazufruf|chazufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazuruthu|chazuruthu]] || [[word:chazuruju|chazuruju]] || [[word:chazurushu|chazurushu]] || [[word:chazuruku|chazuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazuruth|chazuruth]] || [[word:chazuruj|chazuruj]] || [[word:chazurush|chazurush]] || [[word:chazuru|chazuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazuruthul|chazuruthul]] || [[word:chazurujul|chazurujul]] || [[word:chazurushul|chazurushul]] || [[word:chazurukul|chazurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazuruthuthu|chazuruthuthu]] || [[word:chazurujuju|chazurujuju]] || [[word:chazurushushu|chazurushushu]] || [[word:chazuruku|chazuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazuruthun|chazuruthun]] || [[word:chazurujun|chazurujun]] || [[word:chazurushun|chazurushun]] || [[word:chazurukun|chazurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazuruthuoro|chazuruthuoro]] || [[word:chazurujuoro|chazurujuoro]] || [[word:chazurushuoro|chazurushuoro]] || [[word:chazurukuoro|chazurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
